description: A man-in-the-middle flips response.value (hold→ship) leaving the signed metadata and the AHCP-Signature header intact. The agent recomputes payload_sha256 over the RECEIVED payload; it diverges from the signed digest, so verification MUST fail. Proves the v0.3 fix for issue #7.
obligation: Verification MUST fail when response.value is tampered relative to the signed payload_sha256 (observed reason: signature mismatch).

response.comment: Let's get a human eye on the migration first.
Let's get a human eye on the migration first.
